features: Smooth Polished Nails - Get your nails in tip-top shape with our pretty yet practical nail kit manicure set. Small enough to pop in your handbag or stylish enough to display on your dressing table

Everything Your Nails Need – Expertly crafted with travel-size essentials. This nail care kit for women includes all the tools you need: a glass nail file, tweezer, dual cuticle pusher, nail scissors, and a nail clipper

Beautiful and Thoughtful Gift - Our manicure kit is a lovely present for your best friend, wife, mum, sister or daughter. Whatever the occasion, a birthday, mothers day or Christmas, the ladies in your life will love our nail manicure set

Built To Last - Our manicure & pedicure set is made with the finest stainless steel in a careful manufacturing process. We inspect every item for the highest quality. You will get years and years of use out of this beautiful set

Professional Nail Clipper Set - This all-in-one nail set manicure includes all the grooming tools to keep your nails perfectly trimmed. Our nail cutter set is designed for comfortable and precise use, ensuring clean and polished results every time
description: Product Description Great for on the go Say goodbye to nail emergencies! The set is beautifully crafted with travel-sized tools, in a rose gold case you can easily take on the move. Built to Last Featuring 5 nail tools made with high quality, durable stainless steel, this set is built to last! The matching case is lined with white velvet for added protection. Pretty & Practical Not only is this set totally gorgeous, it's also built to last. Give yourself the perfect manicure from home, the office or on the move with this luxury set. Fabulous Gift Idea With a gorgeous gift box included, this is an ideal present. Our beautiful manicure set is the perfect addition to any beauty lover's collection. 7 steps to beautiful hands Step 1 Wash and dry your hands Step 2 Trim your nails using the nail scissors and clippers Step 3 Gently push back your cuticles using the dual cuticle pusher Step 4 Use the glass nail file to smooth the edges of your nails Step 5 Wash your hands again to remove any dust Step 6 Apply your favourite cuticle oil or hand cream and massage in well Step 7 Paint your nails with your favourite nail polish If for any reason you don't like the manicure set or you need a replacement, just get in touch and we will send you a replacement or a refund straight away. Thank you for supporting my dream and shopping with Lily England! Kayleigh xx
